recommendations: ❌ SKEWED EASY: 85.9% of questions score in the easy band (85/99). The question bank is dominated by low-difficulty queries. This creates a ceiling effect — strong RAG systems cannot be differentiated from weak ones on this bank. Recommend adding at least 20 hard questions.

❌ INSUFFICIENT HARD QUESTIONS: Only 4.0% of questions score in the hard band (4/99). A valid measurement instrument needs sufficient hard items to discriminate between high-performing systems. Recommend a minimum of 19 hard questions.
⚠️  THIN MIDDLE: Only 10.1% medium-difficulty questions (10/99). The question bank lacks a gradient — it jumps from easy to hard without sufficient intermediate difficulty.
❌ POOR BALANCE: Difficulty distribution deviates significantly from ideal thirds (Easy 85.9% / Medium 10.1% / Hard 4.0%). The question bank does not provide balanced difficulty coverage.
ℹ️  MANUAL REVIEW NEEDED: 3 questions could not be scored by the LLM judge after retries. Check per_query_scores.json for questions with flagged_dims set.
